rows.finalText: For "How do I commit to the path that feels deeply aligned", the clearest pattern sits in Purpose / Calling with a commitment emphasis. Centered here, the Counterpart falls in Bouquet House. That keeps the other person's position, their motives, and the part of the story you do not control directly close to everything else that is happening. That keeps attention on the part of the story you do not define alone. Placed in Bouquet House, Counterpart shows how the other person's position, their motives, and the part of the story you do not control directly is being shaped by encouragement, grace, and the kind of welcome that makes the path feel more livable in ordinary life. Through the commitment lens, the central card speaks directly: their level of commitment — whether they are fully in or still holding an exit open. The Anchor with the Dog make the central tension easier to name: stability meeting loyalty, which asks you to stabilize what matters and release dead weight while staying alert to assuming loyalty without reciprocity. Anchor and Dog together pull stability, endurance, and what can actually hold alongside loyalty and ally into the same orbit. There is a usable path here, even if it runs straight through the difficulty. Looking past the headline cards, the diagonals run through the Counterpart and the Dog, the Bouquet, the Tower, while the Fox, the Querent tighten the timing around that longer movement. Read together, the diagonals show the underlying direction of travel, while the off-angle links show where smaller factors can interrupt, accelerate, or redirect that direction. Taken together, this is the slower line of development rather than the headline turn of events. The situation has more room in it than the pressure suggests — the strain is real, and so is what can still develop, and neither cancels the other. That picture leaves one thread that concentrates the reading more than the others. The thread worth following runs through Bouquet House: offer gratitude and receive support. That is the sharpest signal in this spread.

setup.question: What is the next right step in my calling?

selectedEntries.selectedText: For vocation, House shows where the path asks for a truer fit rather than a faster answer. Here, focus on home base, habits, and emotional grounding.
selectedEntries.summary: House shapes the path through home.

selectedEntries.selectedText: Tower + Moon blends institution with recognition, asking you to balance professionalism with connection while staying aware of being led by fluctuating mood.
selectedEntries.summary: Tower and Moon create a contextual pair bridge.

weakSummaryLines: This sets the emotional weather for everything that follows.
rows.finalText: The answer to "What is the next right step in my calling" seems to be living in purpose / calling territory with a right path emphasis. Past opens with the House: the need to focus on home base, habits, and emotional grounding. This sets the emotional weather for everything that follows. In your calling, House keeps returning to base structure, fixed conditions, and the foundations that have to hold before anything else can stretch. Through the right path lens, the situation begins with the foundation that confirms you are where you need to be. The Moon in Present acts as the fulcrum, so this is the point where tone, timing, or choice can change the sequence. In your calling, Moon keeps returning to emotional weather, recognition, changing cycles, and what rises or falls with perception. At the right path crux, Moon shows the path confirmed by feeling — not the clearest route but the one that resonates most deeply. Future closes with the Tower, and the directional message is: you may need stronger standards and boundaries when the pivot receives consistent attention. Tower carries distance, standards, official structure, and the part of the situation governed by rules rather than mood into the reading's picture of your calling. Through the right path frame, the emerging path is the formal confirmation that the direction is officially recognized. The Moon shows where the whole sequence either opens or tightens. Track cycles and communicate needs — that is the clearest move this reading points to.
